name: tasuki
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for AI-assisted development. 9 specialized agents, two-layer memory (wikilinks + RAG), TDD enforcement, knowledge graph, and interactive dashboard. Beta — actively improving.
author: Alexander Forero

scripts.postinstall: chmod +x bin/tasuki && find src/engine -name '*.sh' -exec chmod +x {} \; && find src/detectors -name '*.sh' -exec chmod +x {} \; && find src/templates/hooks -name '*.sh' -exec chmod +x {} \;
